calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Proof Of Change Of Venue
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Off Calendar

Petition To Transfer Venue To Alameda County
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall specially appearing for Kevin Urbatsch for (trustee) Fremont Bank. Trisha Friedeberg specially appearing for Rowena Navia for (conservator in case 292438) Paula Bibbs.

The Court stated that this is a petition to transfer to Alameda County, asked if the conservatorship (292438) will be transferred also, and that if it is not being transferred if there will be an issue regarding the separate venues and asked if the accounting is being prepared. Ms. Hall stated that the accounting is being prepared, that it should be ready once the case is transferred and that she does not know if the conservatorship if being transferred. Ms. Friedeberg stated that they will petition for transfer for the conservatorship after the next accounting (3/23/16). The Court requested that Ms. Friedeberg let Ms. Bibbs know that the court would like to see a petition to transfer filed before the date of the accounting and that it can then decide if the accounting should be dealt with here or in Alameda County. The Court granted the petition to transfer venue to Alameda County (subject to receipt/review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos & Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
